testcase.name: Analysis page — structure › renders the Analysis heading
Analysis page — structure › back link points to the project detail page
Analysis page — structure › usage summary is visible
Analysis page — history sidebar › history sidebar shows the History heading on desktop viewports
Analysis page — history sidebar › existing analysis entries are listed in the history sidebar
Analysis page — chat area › chat area renders a prompt textarea
Analysis page — chat area › submit button is present in the chat area
Analysis page — chat area › typing a prompt enables the submit button
Login page › renders the Integrisight.ai brand heading
Login page › renders the dev-credentials sign-in form in development mode
Login page › email input accepts a custom email address
Login page › shows a privacy and security link
Unauthenticated redirects › visiting / redirects to /login when not authenticated
Unauthenticated redirects › visiting /dashboard redirects to /login when not authenticated
Authenticated navigation › authenticated user at /login is shown the dev sign-in form
Authenticated navigation › header shows the signed-in user's name
Authenticated navigation › header has a sign-out button
Sidebar navigation › shows the Integrisight.ai brand name
Sidebar navigation › shows a Projects navigation link
Sidebar navigation › shows a Settings navigation link
Sidebar navigation › shows the Privacy & Security link in the sidebar footer
Sidebar navigation › clicking Settings link navigates to /dashboard/settings
Sidebar navigation › sidebar collapse button toggles the sidebar
Dashboard settings page › settings page renders a heading
Project detail — header › displays the project name
Project detail — header › displays the project status badge
Project detail — header › Analyze button links to the analysis page
Project detail — Overview tab › shows the artifact count card
Project detail — Overview tab › shows the graph version card
Project detail — Overview tab › shows the project status in the stats card
Project detail — Overview tab › shows the created-by name in the details card
Project detail — Artifacts tab › clicking Artifacts tab shows the upload area
Project detail — Artifacts tab › artifacts tab lists uploaded artifacts
Project detail — Graph tab › graph tab shows graph summary when data is available
Project detail — Graph tab › graph tab shows empty-state placeholder when no graph data exists
Project detail — Settings tab › settings tab shows the Edit Project section
Project detail — Settings tab › settings tab shows the Danger Zone
Project detail — Settings tab › clicking Delete Project opens a confirmation dialog
Project detail — Settings tab › delete confirmation dialog can be dismissed with Cancel
Projects list page › renders the Projects heading
Projects list page › shows the Create Project button
Projects list page › lists all projects returned by the API
Projects list page › shows project descriptions
Projects list page › shows artifact count for each project
Projects list page › shows empty state when no projects exist
Projects list page › clicking a project card navigates to the project detail page
Create Project dialog › opens when the New Project button is clicked
Create Project dialog › dialog contains a Name field
Create Project dialog › dialog can be dismissed
